explanation: This command uses an escaped newline character (`n) to split the CLSID string, which is a safe mutation technique. It preserves the original behavior but alters the string format to test for potential bypasses.

This command splits the COM object name into two parts using string concatenation, which is a safe mutation technique. It tests whether the detection rule is sensitive to such obfuscation.
